name: heliosdb-codekb
description: Token-saving code+docs KB for Claude Code. Tree-sitter LSP queries, exact file/doc lookups, GraphRAG section retrieval, cross-modal text-to-code MENTIONS, time-travel branches, and AST diff, served via local MCP over loopback HTTP or stdio fallback. Powered by HeliosDB-Nano so retrieval rides on ART indexes, BM25, HNSW, and typed graph edges instead of file walks.
